name: Zeera Aloo- New Potatoes with Cumin - India
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs new potatoes, cleaned, cooked until tender, then peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. When the oil is hot, add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
3. Add the cooked potatoes to the pan and reduce the heat to medium.
4. Brown the potatoes lightly on all sides.
5. Reduce the heat to low and stir in salt, ground cumin, garam masala, and chili powder.
6. Cook, stirring occasionally until everything is well combined.
7. Add the chopped coriander leaves just before serving.
